---
created: "2026-03-25T00:00:00Z"
updated: "2026-04-06T00:00:00Z"
id: task-sv0-toolchain-milestone-2-prep
key: sv0-toolchain-milestone-2-prep
state: complete
tags:
  - sv0
  - sv0-toolchain
  - milestone-2
  - self-hosting-prep
  - tooling
title: "milestone 2 (prep): self-hosting preparation — test, fmt, doc, lib/ bootstrap seeds"
type: task
roadmap_parent: sv0-toolchain-roadmap-full
---

# milestone 2 (preparation slice): tooling and compiler-in-sv0 entry

## purpose

the [vision and design](http://development.sasankvishnubhatla.net/tcowmbh/task/sv0-compiler-vision-and-design.html) **milestone 2** includes more than the bytecode VM: **test framework** (`sv0 test`, doc tests), **`sv0 fmt`** and **`sv0 doc`** for **sv0 source**, and **beginning the rewrite** of compiler components in sv0.

this task file owns the **non-VM** parts of design milestone 2. the VM stack is **`task/sv0vm-milestone-2.Rmd`**.

## quick start (first time in this repo)

from the **sv0-toolchain** root, after submodules are present:

1. **`make help`** — see **`Makefile`** targets; read **`make test`** and **`make test-guards`** lines (same as **`./scripts/sv0 test`** / **`test-guards`**).
2. **`make test`** or **`./scripts/sv0 test`** — full unified harness (see **completion criteria** below for order). requires **SML/NJ**, **python3**, and time for integration stages.
3. **`make test-guards`** or **`./scripts/sv0 test-guards`** — **Python only** (block comments, **sv0doc** baseline, **`task/*.Rmd`** YAML). same three checks as the start of **`sv0 test`**, **no SML** — use after **`task/`** or **sv0doc** edits before running the full harness.
4. optional: **`./scripts/sv0 doctest`** — Markdown doctests only; **`./scripts/sv0 bootstrap-build`** — VM-compile listed **`.sv0`** seeds.

for the workspace map and **Neo4j** graph refresh after **`task/`** or **sv0doc** edits, see **`task/sv0-toolchain-workspace.Rmd`**.

## dependencies

/require: bash
/require: python3

## configuration

/env: SV0TOOLCHAIN_ROOT=.
/env: SV0C_ROOT=sv0c
/env: SV0VM_ROOT=sv0vm
/env: SV0DOC_ROOT=sv0doc

## prerequisite

bytecode path usable for fast iteration (see `task/sv0vm-milestone-2.Rmd`).

/assert: test -d $SV0C_ROOT/sml/backend/vm

## completion criteria (met)

- **`sv0 test`**: `./scripts/sv0 test` runs, in order: **sv0c** `make test`; **Python** block-comment nesting guard (`scripts/check_sv0_block_comment_nesting.py`); **Python** milestone-0 path check (`scripts/verify_sv0doc_baseline.py` — grammar, types, contracts, memory model, keywords, **`sv0doc/bytecode/*`** stubs); **Python** **`task/*.Rmd`** front-matter lint (`scripts/verify_task_rmd_frontmatter.py` — catches missing spaces after **`:`** on **`updated`**, **`title`**, **`state`**, **`roadmap_parent`**, etc., so **sv0-mcp** graph sync does not silently mis-parse tasks); **sv0vm** bytecode tests; **C** integration (`task/sv0c-milestone-1/02-integration-test.sh`); **VM** integration (`task/sv0vm-milestone-2/02-integration-test.sh`); **`lib/bootstrap-sources.list`** on the VM (`bootstrap-build`); **stage0** golden C vs bootstrap emit when `lib/golden/stage0/<stem>.c` exists; **Markdown doctests** (`scripts/sv0_doctest.py`). Any failure yields a non-zero exit (CI-stable).
- **`sv0 test-guards`**: `./scripts/sv0 test-guards` (and **`make test-guards`**) runs **only** the three Python steps above — no **SML**, **sv0c** units, or integration scripts. Intended for fast feedback on **task** / **sv0doc** / **`.sv0`** comment edits.
- **doc tests**: `task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-2-prep/doctests.md` defines ```sv0 doctest``` fences; policy and runner documented in that file. Run alone via `./scripts/sv0 doctest`.
- **`sv0 fmt`**: **`scripts/fmt_sv0.py`** normalizes trailing whitespace and final newline for all `*.sv0` under `sv0c/` and `sv0vm/`. Shell-only formatting is **`./scripts/sv0 fmt-shell`**; **`./scripts/sv0 fmt`** runs both.
- **`sv0 doc`**: **`scripts/gen_sv0_doc.py`** writes **`build/sv0-toolchain-doc/index.md`** (spec pointers + outline of `sv0c/lib/**/*.sv0`). Same command still verifies expected **sv0doc** and **sv0-mcp** README paths.
- **bootstrap-in-sv0 entry**: **`sv0c/lib/`** with **`span_core.sv0`** (seed transliteration of `sml/error/span.sml`), **`lib/README.md`**, **`lib/LAYOUT.md`**, and **`lib/bootstrap-sources.list`**; commands `./scripts/sv0 bootstrap-build`, `sml` + `--target=vm`. **`sml/`** holds the SML bootstrap; top-level **`lexer/`**, etc. are reserved for future sv0 modules.

## implementation notes

- **`.sv0.md` literate** formatting is **out of scope** for this slice (no normative grammar change in sv0doc); extend `fmt_sv0.py` when blocks are specified.
- **`sv0 doc`** is an **index / outline**, not a full API reference with contracts; link to **sv0doc** and the vision doc for normative prose.
- Some **`main`** control-flow shapes still **omit IR lowering** in the bootstrap compiler; **`span_core.sv0`** uses straight-line code so **VM** emits `main` (see `lib/README.md`).

## refinement log

- 2026-03-25: initial scaffold; criteria copied from design milestone 2; VM split documented.
- 2026-04-01: implemented unified test, doctest runner, fmt_sv0, doc generator, `sv0c/rewrite/`; marked **complete**.
- 2026-04-02: SML bootstrap → **`sv0c/sml/`**; sv0 seeds → **`sv0c/lib/`**; recursive **`--project`**; **`lexer/`** placeholder; **`bootstrap-build`** + **`lib/bootstrap-sources.list`** only (no **`rewrite-build`** / **`rewrite-sources.list`**).
- 2026-04-03: **`lib/diagnostic_core.sv0`** + golden **`diagnostic_core.c`** (diagnostics transliteration after **`span_core`**).
- 2026-04-04: **`lib/diagnostic_batch_core.sv0`**, **`lib/env_core.sv0`**, **`lexer/token_keyword_core.sv0`** + goldens; **sv0vm** `RETURN_SLOTS` fix for struct return.
- 2026-04-05: **`lib/resolver_value_core.sv0`** (three-slot `lookup_value` / `resolve_path_ok`); **`lexer/token_delim_core.sv0`** (delimiter tag band + `is_delimiter_tag`); stage0 goldens + **`bootstrap-sources.list`**.
- 2026-04-06: **`lib/resolver_arity_core.sv0`** (fn arity table + `call_arity_ok`); **`lib/env_scope_core.sv0`** (enter/bind/exit/local lookup); goldens + list.
- 2026-04-07: **`lib/lookup_value_core.sv0`** — merged **`FullEnv`** (`lookup_value` = locals then module); golden + list.
- 2026-04-08: **`lib/resolver_call_core.sv0`** (values + locals + arity + **`expr_call_ok`**); **`lib/lookup_type_core.sv0`** (prelude tags, module types, **Self**); goldens + list.
- 2026-04-09: **`lib/type_alias_core.sv0`**, **`lexer/token_op_core.sv0`** + goldens.
- 2026-04-10: **`lib/lookup_type_alias_core.sv0`** + golden (integrated type lookup + aliases).
- 2026-04-11: **`parser/expr_entry_core.sv0`** + golden (`parsePrimaryExpr` dispatch vs **`parser.sml`**).
- 2026-04-12: **`lexer/token_delim_core.sv0`** bracket tags + **`expr_entry_core`** bracket **16**; refreshed goldens.
- 2026-04-13: **`parser/item_entry_core.sv0`** + golden (`parseItem` dispatch).
- 2026-04-14: **`parser/stmt_entry_core.sv0`** + golden (`tryStmt` dispatch).
- 2026-04-15: **`lexer/token_keyword_core.sv0`** break/continue tags + **`stmt_entry_core`** alignment; goldens refreshed.
- 2026-04-16: **`parser/assign_lhs_core.sv0`** + golden (assign LHS slice).
- 2026-04-17: **`lexer/token_delim_core.sv0`** DOT + assignment **`=`**; **`assign_lhs_core`** + goldens refreshed.
- 2026-04-18: **`parser/try_assign_stmt_core.sv0`** + golden (`tryAssignStmt` stub).
- 2026-04-19: **`parser/assign_binop_core.sv0`** + golden; **`assign_lhs_core`** / **`try_assign_stmt_core`** refreshed.
- 2026-04-20: **`lexer/token_op_core.sv0`** compound-assign tags **211–220** + golden.
- 2026-04-21: **`parser/expr_rhs_stub_core.sv0`** + **`try_assign_stmt_core`** RHS stub + goldens.
- 2026-04-22: **`try_assign_stmt_core`** — **`try_assign_deref_op_rhs_stub`** (7-arg) for **`*x = 1 + 2`**, truncated RHS, wrong leading token; golden refreshed.
- 2026-04-23: **`try_assign_field_op_rhs_stub`** (8-arg) for **`a.b = 1 + 2`**, truncated RHS, **`EQ` instead of DOT** between segments; golden refreshed.
- 2026-04-24: **`try_assign_index_op_rhs_stub`** (9-arg) for **`a[i] = 1 + 2`** (**`[`**/**`]`** **16**/**17**), truncated RHS, **`DOT` instead of `[`**; golden refreshed.
- 2026-04-25: **`parser/expr_pratt_stub_core.sv0`** — **`pratt_rhs_ok_with_semi`** (**tag_op_plus** **20** vs **tag_op_star** **22**, six-token window); bootstrap list + golden.
- 2026-04-26: **`try_assign_stmt_core`** — **`try_assign_id_op_pratt_rhs_stub`** + duplicated **`pratt_rhs_ok_with_semi`**; **`tok_binop_star`**; golden refreshed.
- 2026-04-27: Pratt RHS helpers for **deref** / **field** / **index** LHS (**9** / **10** / **11** args); golden refreshed.
- 2026-04-28: **`parser/expr_prec_ladder_core.sv0`** — **`parseAddExpr`** / **`parseMulExpr`** tier ranks (**20–21** vs **22–23**) + golden; documents SML ladder above numeric Pratt.
- 2026-04-29: **`lexer/token_op_core.sv0`** — **`tag_op_percent`** (**29**), **`is_operator_tag`**; **`expr_prec_ladder_core`** mul tier includes **`%`**; goldens refreshed.
- 2026-04-30: **`expr_pratt_stub_core`** / **`try_assign_stmt_core`** — unary **MINUS** (**21**) before primary (**`pratt_from_atom`** refactor); goldens refreshed.
- 2026-05-01: **`pratt_rhs_ok_with_semi7`** (**t0..t6**) + **`try_assign_*_op_pratt_rhs_stub7`** — unary **` - lit+lit*lit ;`** on all Pratt LHS shapes; goldens refreshed.
- 2026-05-02: **`pratt_is_add_binop`** (**20** / **21**) in **`pratt_from_atom`** — binary **`-`** with **`*`** precedence; goldens refreshed.
- 2026-05-03: **`parser/expr_cast_core.sv0`** — **`parseCastExpr`** stub (**atom `;`** or **`atom as i32 ;`**, **`as`** **61**); bootstrap list + golden.
- 2026-05-04: **`expr_cast_core`** — **`parse_cast_stub_ok_with_semi6`**: chained **`as`** (**`1 as i32 as u32 ;`** as two **73** type slots); golden refreshed.
- 2026-05-05: **`parser/type_parse_core.sv0`** — **`parse_type_unit_ok`** (**10**/**11**), **`parse_type_ident_ok`** (**73**); bootstrap list + golden.
- 2026-05-06: textual **`include "…";`** (see **`sv0c/doc/transliteration-include.md`**) + **`parser/include/token_type_stub.sv0`** shared by **`expr_cast_core`** / **`type_parse_core`**; block-comment **`/*`** nesting pitfall documented; stage0 goldens refreshed.
- 2026-05-07: **`scripts/check_sv0_block_comment_nesting.py`** + **`sv0 test`** hook — scans **`sv0c/**/*.sv0`** for nested **`/*`** inside block comments (regression guard).
- 2026-05-08: same guard extended to **`sv0doc/`**, **`sv0vm/`**, **`sv0-mcp/`** when those directories exist (default roots; no **`.sv0`** there yet).
- 2026-05-09: **`parser/include/type_parse_prefix.sv0`** — shared **`parse_type_unit_ok`** / **`parse_type_ident_ok`** + delim stand-ins; **`expr_cast_core`** gains **`parse_cast_stub_ok_with_semi7`** (**`()`** or **IDENT** after each **`as`**); block-comment guard extended to catch risky **`/*`‑like** sequences in **`.sv0`** lines; stage0 goldens refreshed.
- 2026-05-10: **`sv0doc/bytecode/format.md`** + **`instructions.md`** (milestone-0 bytecode anchors for **`sv0 doc`**); **`scripts/verify_sv0doc_baseline.py`** + **`sv0 test`** hook; **`parser/expr_unary_stub_core.sv0`** (**`parseUnaryExpr`** five-token window); **`lib/lower_unop_core.sv0`** (**`unopToC`** / **ExprUnop** discriminant slice); stage0 goldens **`expr_unary_stub_core.c`**, **`lower_unop_core.c`**; **`lib/LAYOUT.md`** maps parser §6 / IR §10.
- 2026-05-11: Human-facing docs: **`README.md`**, **`task/sv0-toolchain-workspace.Rmd`**, **`task/sv0-toolchain-roadmap-full.Rmd`** (milestones **0–3** snapshot table + graph-sync note); **`sv0doc/README.md`** milestone bullet for bytecode + **`verify_sv0doc_baseline`**; **`sv0c/lib/README.md`** entries for **`expr_unary_stub_core`** / **`lower_unop_core`**. **sv0-mcp** graph refreshed (**`sync_graph`** / **`./scripts/sync-graph.sh all`**).
- 2026-05-12: **`sv0-mcp/README.md`** — **“When to run a full sync”**; **`task/sv0-toolchain-roadmap-full.Rmd`** YAML **`updated:`** spacing fix.
- 2026-05-13: **`scripts/sv0`** **`test`** usage text + **`Makefile`** **`make test`** help aligned with real pipeline (stage0 golden + Python guards named); roadmap YAML **`updated:`** spacing corrected again for parsers that require a space after **`:`**.
- 2026-05-14: **`task/sv0-toolchain-workspace.Rmd`** — **`make help`** called out so **`Makefile`** and **`./scripts/sv0`** stay discoverable together; roadmap YAML **`updated:`** fixed (space after colon).
- 2026-05-15: **Quick start** subsection (**`make help`** → **`make test`** / **`sv0 test`**); YAML **`updated:`** + title (**bootstrap seeds** not “rewrite entry”). Roadmap note: M3 needs engineering, not docs-only.
- 2026-05-16: YAML front matter normalized (**`updated:`** / **`title:`** / **`state:`** — space after colon) for **sv0-mcp** graph extractors and strict parsers; same for **`task/sv0-toolchain-roadmap-full.Rmd`**, **`task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-3-self-host.Rmd`**, **`task/sv0vm-milestone-2.Rmd`**. **`sv0vm-milestone-2.Rmd`** **`roadmap_parent`** restored to **`sv0-toolchain-roadmap-full`** (was corrupted).
- 2026-04-02: **`scripts/verify_task_rmd_frontmatter.py`** + **`sv0 test`** hook; **`state: done`** spacing on **`task/sv0c-*.Rmd`** hub files; regression guard so **`task/`** YAML stays graph-safe.
- 2026-04-03: **`task/sv0-toolchain-workspace.Rmd`** — one-line **YAML spacing** reminder for editors; re-normalized **`updated:`** / **`title:`** / **`state:`** / **`roadmap_parent`** on roadmap, M2 prep, M3, **sv0vm** M2, and **`task/sv0c-*.Rmd`** after in-tree regression (same shapes **`verify_task_rmd_frontmatter.py`** flags).
- 2026-04-04: **`.cursor/rules/`** — numbered **`.mdc`** modules committed (workspace context, planning, **`.Rmd`** docs, spec-first semantics, **sv0c** / **sv0vm** / **sv0-mcp** boundaries, validation, style, anti-patterns); **`README.md`** agent workflow cross-link from **`00-workspace-context.mdc`**.
- 2026-04-05: **`./scripts/sv0 test-guards`** + **`make test-guards`** — Python-only entrypoint for the three guards (shared implementation with **`sv0 test`** via **`run_python_guards`**); **README**, **`Makefile`**, **`task/sv0-toolchain-workspace.Rmd`** updated.
- 2026-04-06: **`task/sv0-toolchain-roadmap-full.Rmd`** milestones **0–3** snapshot + graph-sync note mention **`test-guards`**; **`.cursor/rules/15-root-orchestration-entrypoints.mdc`** lists **`test`** / **`test-guards`** as stable interfaces.

## related

- `task/sv0-toolchain-roadmap-full.Rmd` — full option C index
- `task/sv0vm-milestone-2.Rmd` — VM backend + interpreter + REPL slice
